2026-04-24T23:13:36.6797621Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-24T23:13:36.6798175Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-24T23:13:36.6798594Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-24T23:13:36.6798955Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-24T23:13:36.6799273Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-24T23:13:36.6799520Z [36;1m[0m

2026-04-24T23:13:36.6799882Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-24T23:13:36.6800061Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-24T23:13:36.6800481Z [36;1m{[0m
